svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="agent-system-coding-overview" name="Overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-584" dy="-192" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1200" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="g_user" parent="1" style="group;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=10;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;" value="使用入口" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="200" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="g_user" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1" value="用户 / 操作者" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="20" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli" parent="g_user" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1" value="CLI 入口
cli.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="20" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="monitor" parent="g_user" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1" value="Monitor 入口
monitor.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="20" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_exec" parent="1" style="group;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=10;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;" value="编排与执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="480" width="240" x="280" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="workflow" parent="g_exec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1" value="Workflow Orchestrator
backend/workflow.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prompts" parent="g_exec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Prompt Builder
backend/prompts.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="codex" parent="g_exec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Codex CLI Adapter
backend/codex_cli.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="writers" parent="g_exec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Trace & Writers
tracing.py / writers.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_asset" parent="1" style="group;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=10;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;" value="运行资产" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="240" x="560" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="snapshot" parent="g_asset" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1" value="Snapshot / Runtime Store
snapshot.py / runtime.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="artifacts" parent="g_asset" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="运行产物
plan / tasks / traces / summary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="log" parent="g_asset" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="运行日志
process.log / run.json" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_display" parent="1" style="group;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=10;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;" value="展示与监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="240" x="840" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="http" parent="g_display" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1" value="HTTP Handler
backend/server/http_handler.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dashboard" parent="g_display" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Dashboard UI
frontend/dashboard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="traceviewer" parent="g_display" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Trace Viewer UI
frontend/trace_viewer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_repo" parent="1" style="group;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=10;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;" value="目标仓库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="240" x="560" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="repo" parent="g_repo" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1" value="Demo Repo / Target Repo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="cli" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="monitor" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="cli" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="workflow" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="workflow" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="prompts" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="workflow" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="codex" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="workflow" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="writers" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="writers" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="snapshot" value="读写运行状态"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="writers" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="artifacts" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="writers" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="log" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="monitor" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="http" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="snapshot" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="http" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="artifacts" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="http" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="log" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="http" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e14" edge="1" parent="1" source="http" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="dashboard" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e15" edge="1" parent="1" source="http" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="traceviewer" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e16" edge="1" parent="1" source="codex" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="repo" value="改动目标仓库"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e17" edge="1" parent="1" source="snapshot" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="repo" value="初始化 / 读取"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
